name: journal-of-management-sciences-in-china-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to 《管理科学学报》 (Journal of Management Sciences in China, JMSC) — the NSFC-flagship for quantitative / mathematical management science co-sponsored by the NSFC Management Science Division and Tianjin University (monthly, ISSN 1007-9807, CN 12-1275/G3). The deliverable is MODELS + PROOFS + ALGORITHMS, not survey/case empirics. Covers fit positioning (数理 vs 经验实证), decision-problem formulation, model building (variables / constraints / objective / assumptions), propositions and proofs, algorithm design with complexity / convergence analysis, numerical experiments for managerial insight, behavioral OM, model-derived decision rules, unified notation, submission preflight (formula / theorem typesetting, online system), and R&R rebuttal.
